color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STEP 1 — load-and-chunk
ctx.step.run()
Result is cached on completion

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_load(ctx)
Reads pdf_path and source_id
from ctx.event.data

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PDFReader().load_data(file)
LlamaIndex opens the PDF binary
Returns one Document per page

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Filter docs with text
Skips blank or image-only pages

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SentenceSplitter.split_text()
chunk_size = 1000 tokens
chunk_overlap = 200 tokens
Splits only at sentence boundaries

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
→ RAGChunkAndSrc
chunks: list of text strings
source_id: the PDF identifier

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STEP 2 — embed-and-upsert
ctx.step.run()
Receives RAGChunkAndSrc from Step 1

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
embed_texts(chunks)
Loops over each chunk individually
gemini-embedding-2 aggregates batch
inputs — must call one at a time

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gemini: embed_content()
model: gemini-embedding-2
output_dimensionality: 768
One API call per chunk

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
uuid.uuid5(NAMESPACE_URL, key)
Deterministic ID per chunk
Same PDF always gets same UUID
Re-ingesting updates, not duplicates

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Build payloads
source: source_id
text: chunk content

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VectorDB().upsert()
Builds PointStruct list
Sends all points to Qdrant in batch

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Qdrant: client.upsert()
Stores vectors and payloads
HNSW index, COSINE distance

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
